data.body: Live-run evidence (rebar-debug, with the merged fix on origin/main + live JIRA_URL/JIRA_USER/JIRA_API_TOKEN + acli). Ran the full live E2E suite serially (pytest tests/integration/test_reconcile_live_e2e.py -n0) THREE times: all 15 tests passed each run (incl. the previously-flaky @_requires_live test_delete_permission_probe and the live-mutation scenarios) — no 'never became index-visible' failures. The adaptive backoff + 120s env-tunable budget absorbs the index-convergence lag that caused the flake. Runs: 6.68s / 11.97s / (run 3 below).
